description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine setdiagresascc_2, and is implemented by a call to setdiagresascc_2. This API is used to set the ASCC short circuit analysis annotation options in the active Slider diagram. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. setdiagresascc(annot, type, bus, boe, ctrib, frm, to, last, id, style, width, color)
python_syntax: setdiagresascc(annot, type, bus, boe, ctrib, frm, to, last, id, style, width, color)

parameters.name: ctrib
parameters.description: Contributions at home bus for bus faults. (input).

parameters.name: frm
parameters.description: From bus if a line fault is applied. (input).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: To bus if a line fault is applied. (input).

parameters.name: last
parameters.description: Third bus if a line fault is applied to a 3-winding transformer. (input).

parameters.name: style
parameters.description: Line style applied to the faulted bus diagram item. (input).

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Line width applied to the faulted bus diagram item, >= 1. (input).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color for diagram items that are faulted. (input).

boe.description: fault located at the faulted bus.
fault located at the faulted bus with lines outaged.
fault located at the end of lines.

ctrib.description: contributions at home bus for all faulted buses for selected fault.
